metadata.title: Of the Father's Love Begotten
metadata.subtitle: Prudentius (4th c.) — English tr. J. M. Neale (1854) / H. W. Baker (1859)
metadata.lyricist: Aurelius Prudentius Clemens (348–c. 413), Latin original "Corde natus ex Parentis"; English translation by John Mason Neale (1818–1866) and Henry W. Baker (1821–1877)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Prudentius wrote the Latin in the 4th century (PD by ~1600 years). Neale (d. 1866) and Baker (d. 1877) died > 145 years ago. The plainsong melody is medieval and PD
metadata.x_translator: John Mason Neale + Henry W. Baker (English)
